label: US recession
mappingPolicy: NBER peak month is the last expansion month; recession months run from the month after the peak through the trough month, inclusive.

sources.name: NBER US Business Cycle Expansions and Contractions
FRED USREC
sources.role: monthly cross-check using the period-following-peak-through-trough convention

limitations: The NBER chronology is ex-post and turning points may be announced with material delay; it is an evaluation label, not a real-time input.
The label is binary and US-specific; it does not identify inflation shocks, financial stress outside recessions, or the project's full multi-regime taxonomy.
Coverage is frozen through 2025-12-31 for reproducibility and must be versioned before adding later cycles.
